creator: rdunkle@smallcatbrain.com
text:
The serial port/console is now working.
A firmware update for the UEFI corrected the serial port.
https://github.com/edk2-porting/edk2-rk3588/commit/f8af61cbe1fa168a557a7176e68ff7da1af29444

The relevant lines in the /boot.loader.conf
boot_multicons="YES"
console="comconsole,efi"

The efi video console and the serial port console work.
Default serial port is connected to a usb-serial CH340 device.  The CH340 has 3 wires connected to the board as shown in the Orange Pi User Manual.
Putty setting is: 1500000, 8,1,none,XON/XOFF

This is FreeBSD 14.2-STABLE stable/14-09def8d654e7 GENERIC arm64
